title: Govt Charity Grant Fund, a Good Time to Help
body:
I read that the Govt was marching donations by 15 x to some Aid agencies by June 30th so I gave $50 each to World Vision and Baptist World Aid and it became $750 each! I am mentioning this because I think it's a good deal and is tax deductible too. Please don't post negative comments, people are suffering and these people do help.
mod: Title edited and information added for clarity.
From Baptist World Aid website
https://baptistworldaid.org.au/appeals/matching-grant/
How can my donation have multiplied impact?
Now is the best time to give to our Matching Grant Appeal because your tax-deductible donation will be combined with funding from the Australian Government through the Australian NGO Cooperation Program (ANCP). When you give by 30 June, your gift will be combined with funds from the Australian Government to do more good and help more people. We are more effective in fighting poverty when you give before 30 June.
*For every $5 of government funding, we must provide at least $1 in supporter donations. Should the funds raised exceed the amount required to meet the needs of the Matching Grant Fund, we will use the excess funds to support related projects.
Baptist World Aid Australia is fully accredited with the Australian Government Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade and receives funding from the Australian NGO Cooperative Program to support our overseas development projects.
…
Donations of $2 or more are tax deductible. All donations are in Australian Dollars.
